items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.0.0-Beta-7 Available
items.message:
v3.0.0-Beta-7 is now available in pre-releases.

The wallpaper downloader has been reworked to use a more reliable JSON database system instead of the GitHub API. This improves stability, avoids rate limits, and ensures wallpaper sources load consistently.

You can download the latest pre-release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is currently not available.

To properly support macOS builds and testing, a Mac device is needed.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
